TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Minse, title = Minse, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Minse} }

S.FORM: alang Minse ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 13 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 7 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga Trayan. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga Lwax khu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Minse ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 13 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 7 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Minse hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Minse hya' ga Trayan. tay mkyahu' na Minse hya' ga Lwax khu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mins~ɕe ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, **/** . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mins~ɕe ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mins~ɕe ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mins~ɕe ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mins~ɕe ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mins~ɕe ħjaʔ ɣa trajan. taj mkjaħuʔ na mins~ɕe ħjaʔ ɣa lwax kħuʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
